description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The structure is predominantly white, featuring large rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows on the upper floors. The property is enclosed by a low wall and includes a spacious outdoor area with a swimming pool and a separate patio section furnished with a round table and chairs. There is a small balcony or terrace on the upper floor, adorned with potted plants, and a secondary outdoor area with a hot tub. The main entrance is located at the front, accessible via a gate and a short pathway, and the house appears to have two main stories with a possible rooftop access.
description: A modern, white, cubic house with flat roof, large windows, and a spacious outdoor area featuring a pool and patio. The design is minimalist with symmetrical window rows and a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the upper terrace with plants, the pool, and the patio area with outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and the full layout of the pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the pool, patio, and a secondary structure attached to the main house.
description_view_3: Back view showing the terrace with hot tub, rear windows, and the gated entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, short pathway, and a gated fence; minimal decorative elements.
